inputs.fcf_source: FY2025 free cash flow $7.651B (OCF $9.864B minus capex $2.213B) divided by 560M diluted weighted-average shares (10-K filed 2026-03-23, fiscal year ended 2026-01-30)
inputs.dividend_source: Cash dividends declared $4.35 per share in fiscal 2025 (10-K)
inputs.normalization_note: Lawrence base uses FY2025 filed free cash flow. FY2025 share repurchases were only $211M (down from $4.1B) as capital funded FBM and ADG acquisitions; debt rose to $37.5B. Q1 FY2026 gross margin compressed to 32.7% versus 33.4% prior year — not used as FCF starting point.

bear.notes: Housing starts soften; comp transactions stay negative; Pro integration costs linger; multiple compresses toward mid-cycle big-box peers

base.notes: Modest comp growth; Pro and wholesale acquisitions (FBM, ADG) add revenue; ticket inflation offsets transaction declines; buybacks resume after deleveraging

bull.notes: Pro share gains and Total Home strategy lift comps; FBM/ADG synergies; margin recovery; sustained $4B+ annual repurchases resume

option_scan.question: GAAP book misstates core assets?
option_scan.evidence: Retail store and distribution assets on balance sheet at cost; no land NAV misstatement pattern (10-K FY2025)

option_scan.question: Undeveloped reserves / dormant royalty?
option_scan.evidence: Operating home improvement retailer; no resource royalty

option_scan.question: In-business loss segment?
option_scan.evidence: Retail Home Improvement and Other (FBM/ADG wholesale) both profitable; Other segment $2.2B sales FY2025 (10-K segment note)

option_scan.question: Backlog / embedded product option in revenue path?
option_scan.evidence: Pro customer, installation services, and online fulfillment in Total Home strategy; modeled via growth assumptions not separate terminal (10-K)

option_scan.question: Private or illiquid stakes below fair value?
option_scan.evidence: No material private equity stakes disclosed

option_scan.question: Transitory legal recovery?
option_scan.evidence: Operating compounder; dividend is ongoing policy

option_scan.question: Product option already in revenue?
option_scan.evidence: Pro, installation, and wholesale distribution already in revenue path; FBM/ADG acquisitions embedded in FY2025 Other segment growth

growth_explanation.mechanism: Duopoly scale (1,759 U.S. stores, 540+ wholesale branches post-FBM/ADG) plus Pro customer focus and ticket inflation compound owner cash modestly above flat comps; buybacks resume after acquisition-related debt paydown.
growth_explanation.source: 10-K FY2025: comp +0.2% (ticket +3.0%, transactions -2.8%); net sales +3.1% to $86.3B; ROIC 26.1%

falsifiers.observation: U.S. housing starts decline two consecutive years with comp transactions worse than -3%
falsifiers.action: Cut growth years 1-5 toward bear 1%; cap exit multiple at 16x

falsifiers.observation: Gross margin falls below 32% for two consecutive quarters without tariff pass-through
falsifiers.action: Trim base growth 1-2 pp; downgrade moat assessment

falsifiers.observation: Long-term debt exceeds $40B without EBITDA growth or buyback restart
falsifiers.action: Cap bull case; flag capital allocation in [HUMAN REVIEW]

paths.label: Growth theory (pre-falsifier)
paths.weight_why: Segment blend before falsifier pass; diagnostic only when it differs from falsifier-adjusted.
weight_falsifiers: Included at full weight alongside falsifier-adjusted without divergence note

paths.label: Bear scenario (Lawrence)
paths.weight_why: Downside stress; low weight because bear is a sensitivity, not a competing explanation of base mechanics.
weight_falsifiers: Bear assumptions become base case in filings (e.g. sustained volume collapse)
paths.hard_to_vary: yes: asymmetric low weight is structural

paths.label: Bull scenario (Lawrence)
paths.weight_why: Upside stress probe; higher than bear because optionality archetype has skew, but still below primary paths.
weight_falsifiers: Bull growth sustained in filings for 4+ quarters without falsifier trigger

qualitative_adjustments.factor: No dated predictive attribute at spot
qualitative_adjustments.rationale: Scarcity is descriptive; no timed mispricing catalyst in base
qualitative_adjustments.falsifier: Cross-check names dated catalyst with timeline

deutsch_checks.reach: Weights encode evidence tier (A primary → D external), not fitted to hit a target IRR

synthesis.notes: Capstone IRR combining filings, segments, overlays, third-party, qualitative

total_return_panel.error: Vendor events are discovery evidence; primary-source completeness has not been established.
total_return_panel.return_contract: split-adjusted close excluding dividends; event amounts normalized for later splits; cash reinvested at ex-date close; pre-tax nominal

coverage.note: Vendor events are discovery evidence; primary-source completeness has not been established.

context_overlay.disclaimer: Context only. Tailwinds inform stance and overlay sizing; they do not auto-inflate Lawrence base IRR. Promotion to base case requires [HUMAN REVIEW].

insider_signal.disclaimer: Context only. Insider activity informs scenario confidence and stance discussion; it does not auto-inflate Lawrence base IRR. Promotion requires [HUMAN REVIEW].

scenario_confidence.note: Scenario weights are qualitative confidence only; Lawrence base IRR unchanged.

top_dissents.label: Murray Stahl
top_dissents.falsifier: No asset intensity / pricing power (moat eroding + non-croupier)

top_dissents.label: Horizon Kinetics
top_dissents.falsifier: No dated contractual payoff or royalty/trust structure

lens_consensus.disclaimer: Advisory lens blend only. Does not replace Lawrence total-synthesis stance gate without [HUMAN REVIEW].
